title: Better Server Sleep
description: This datapack/mod make sleeping easier on multiplayer by needing only one player to sleep to skip the night !
body:
![better server sleep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb56d6a05ddee9b8dd8f70a40d66d5efcb4bbd7e.png)


This datapack/mod make sleeping easier on multiplayer by needing only one player to sleep to skip the night !

Alternatively you could use the command " /gamerule playersSleepingPercentage 1 " to make the exact same thing, but you know, this datapack have a little notification when reloaded so it's cooler !
